en.START_QUEST: I finally reach Satbury. I'll ask the locals what they know about the village chief's disappearance. Perhaps they have other assignments.
en.INFO_FROM_VILLAGER_1: Apparently, the chief was secretly negotiating with bandits.
en.INFO_FROM_VILLAGER_2: Lunars for the new chapel were missing, but the chief's house wasn't repainted. He must have given them to someone.
en.INFO_FROM_VILLAGER_3: The guard claims that there have been no problems with bandits in the village for a long time, but before winter they often had to drive them away.
en.INFO_FROM_VILLAGER_4: The innkeeper claims his supplies have been disappearing. It always happened when the village elder was at the inn.
en.INFO_FROM_CHIEFS_WIFE: His wife claims he's been acting strangely since winter. He received the letter the night he disappeared. He wanted to burn it, but at the last minute she pulled it out of the fireplace. I read in the letter that Hendrik wanted to break some kind of contract, but was threatened not to. Since he doesn't have one, he probably tried. The letter mentioned someone named Jonas, maybe the guards will know something.
en.INFO_ABOUT_JONAS: Jonas Stonebend is a well-known bandit leader in this area. I have to find him. Guard told me to look for a bandit patrol nearby, defeat them, and try to find some disguise to sneak up to Jonas himself.
en.SEARCH_BANDIT_SCOUT_CAMP: The villagers mentioned bandits operating near the forest. I should look for a smaller scout camp and see what they were up to.
en.BANDIT_CAMP_FOUND: I found a small bandit camp hidden among the trees. It looks like they were watching the village.
en.BANDITS_DEFEATED: The bandits are dead. They won't be troubling the roads anymore.
en.FOUND_BANDIT_LETTER: I found a letter among the bandits' belongings. It mentions the village chief and a deal gone wrong.
en.READ_BANDIT_LETTER: The letter confirms it. The chief was negotiating with the bandits to keep Satbury safe. When he tried to back out, they took him hostage.
en.FOUND_BANDIT_DISGUISE: Among their gear, I found usable bandit clothing. With this, I might be able to enter their main camp unnoticed.
en.NEW_OBJECTIVE_MAIN_CAMP: The letter mentions a larger camp deeper in the forest. That's where they're holding the chief.
en.CHIEF_SAVED: The letter mentions a larger camp deeper in the forest. That's where they're holding the chief.
en.HENDRIK_CHIEF_SAVED: Hendrik was held captive in the bandits' dungeon. Time to return for his reward.
en.REWARD: Reward received, time to look for new orders.

pl.QUEST_TAKEN_FROM_TABLE: Znalazłem zlecenie, w którym ktoś o imieniu Meredith szuka swojego męża. Więcej dowiem się od niej.
pl.INFO_ABOUT_MEREDITH: Dowiedziałem się, że znajdę ją w gospodzie.
